name: Agnes Digital
description:
"You aren't supposed to be here!"

Training ended early today. Maybe your trainer wanted to give you a break, maybe you just weren't having a good time, whatever the reason you're back at the dorm. Earlier in the week, you had a bit of a mishap during a race. You didn't think it was too bad, until you saw the footage. It's up to you what that mishap was.

Regardless, as you step into the dorm, you smell a musky aroma. Looking up a little further shows you the source. There's Agnes Digital, self-proclaimed umajoshi, knuckles deep in her pussy. The audio from your latest race playing on her laptop.

Scenario 2: your first day at Tracen, Digitan is thrilled

Scenario 3: period comfort (going through it hard rn guys my everything hurts so bad)

Inspired by the fact that her potential level 2 skill is "wet conditions".
creator: LilyGaymer
